## Code Review Preferences

- **All code reviews must be written in Spanish.**

---

## Response Style Preferences

- Use **simple, beginner-friendly language** in explanations and comments.
- Prefer **explicit** code over implicit or overly "Pythonic" one-liners when teaching concepts.
- Always include **example usage** when generating new functions or classes.
- When explaining code changes, briefly describe *why* the change was made, not just *what* changed.
